name: Iconify
description: Universal open-source icon framework unifying 200k+ icons from 150+ icon sets into one API. Supports React, Vue, Svelte components and a Figma plugin for seamless icon browsing.

seo.title: Iconify — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Iconify: Universal open-source icon framework unifying 200k+ icons from 150+ icon sets into one API. Supports React, Vue, Svelte components and a Figma plugin f

when_to_use: 200k+ icons browsed and dropped into Figma via plugin
Framework-agnostic icon component switching set at build time
On-demand icon API eliminating full icon font bundle
Design token linking icon names to Iconify slugs in code
SVG icon rendered server-side as inline HTML without JS

pros: 200k+ icons across 150+ sets unified by one API
Official React, Vue, Svelte, and Figma components
cons: Runtime lookup adds a small performance cost
License of individual icon sets varies; check per-set
Huge catalog can slow design decisions
review.verdict: The most comprehensive icon framework available today; the right default if you want one API across any icon library.
review.best_for: Projects that need access to many icon sets without bundling each library individually.
review.not_for: Tiny static sites or teams that only ever use one curated icon set.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
